summary: Phase 4 Production Modal Adjustments Testing Complete. All frontend and backend features verified working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality. Previously noted in iteration 9/10.

passed_tests: FRONTEND: Production button (data-testid='production-btn') is prominent with bg-green-600 background
FRONTEND: Production button has Factory icon and text 'Producción'
FRONTEND: Production button is NOT inside icon toolbar - positioned next to 'Nueva Orden' button
FRONTEND: Order field is TEXT INPUT (data-testid='production-order-input') - NOT a dropdown
FRONTEND: Typing valid order (UNDO-E2E) shows green border and checkmark icon
FRONTEND: Typing invalid order shows red border and 'Orden no encontrada' message
FRONTEND: Client auto-fills when order is found (data-testid='production-client-display')
FRONTEND: Quantity total auto-fills when order is found (data-testid='production-qty-display')
FRONTEND: Machine is dropdown (data-testid='production-machine-select') with MAQUINA1-14
FRONTEND: Setup value persists in localStorage key 'production_setup_value'
FRONTEND: Setup value persists between modal opens
FRONTEND: After submit, quantity clears but setup value remains
FRONTEND: Progress bar shows correctly with color coding (100% = green)
FRONTEND: Production history table loads for matched order
BACKEND: POST /api/production-logs creates log with order_id, quantity_produced, machine, setup
BACKEND: POST /api/production-logs validates machine is MAQUINA1-14
BACKEND: POST /api/production-logs validates order exists (returns 404 for invalid)
BACKEND: POST /api/production-logs requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/production-logs/{order_id} returns logs and total_produced
BACKEND: GET /api/production-summary returns aggregated totals per order
BACKEND: DELETE /api/production-logs/{log_id} requires admin role
BACKEND: All 14 machines (MAQUINA1-MAQUINA14) accepted as valid
BACKEND: Invalid machines (MAQUINA0, MAQUINA15, etc.) rejected with 400
critical_code_review_comments: ProductionModal.js: Clean implementation with useState for orderSearch, matchedOrder state
ProductionModal.js: Correct text input with data-testid='production-order-input'
ProductionModal.js: Green/red border styling based on order match status
ProductionModal.js: localStorage persistence for setup via SETUP_STORAGE_KEY
ProductionModal.js: Auto-display of client and quantity from matchedOrder
Dashboard.js line 2275-2277: Production button correctly positioned with bg-green-600
Dashboard.js: Production button is standalone, NOT inside icon toolbar area
seed_data_creation: Used existing UNDO-E2E test order. Backend tests auto-cleanup created test orders.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Production Modal Adjustments fully verified. Changes from previous iteration: 1) Order field changed from Select dropdown to text INPUT with auto-search, 2) Client and Quantity auto-display as read-only when order found, 3) Setup persists in localStorage (key: production_setup_value), 4) Production button moved outside icon toolbar to be a standalone prominent green button with text 'Producción'. All backend endpoints unchanged. Test orders: UNDO-E2E has production logs.

production_button.position: Next to Nueva Orden, NOT in icon toolbar

setup_persistence.behavior: Persists between modal opens, survives form submission
